name: marketplace-hygiene
description: Marketplace-integrity hooks for zenhive plugin development: blocks direct edits to auto-synced SKILL.md files (redirecting to the canonical ~/.claude/includes/*.md source via the shared scripts/skill-include-map.sh), and validates marketplace.json / plugin.json / hooks.json on every edit so JSON parse errors surface immediately instead of at marketplace-load time. Self-contained, no plugin-internal dependencies.
